blended.narrative: Mont Sutton is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,960 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
